mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tiktok_pixels (advertiser_id, pixel_id, pixel_name, pixel_code, status) VALUES (#{advertiserId}, #{pixelId}, #{pixelName}, #{pixelCode}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'active'))
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tiktok_pixels WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM tiktok_pixels WHERE pixel_id = #{pixelId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM tiktok_pixels WHERE advertiser_id = #{advertiserId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM tiktok_pixels ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tiktok_pixels SET pixel_name = #{pixelName}, pixel_code = #{pixelCode}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tiktok_pixels SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE pixel_id = #{pixelId}
